turns.text: Hi, what's still missing from my application?
Hi Asha! You're missing your vehicle registration. Everything else (license, insurance) looks good — please upload it in the app to continue.
How long does the background check usually take?
Background checks typically take 2-3 business days. Yours is currently in progress — we'll notify you as soon as it clears.
Can you schedule my vehicle inspection for next Tuesday?
I'm sorry, but your background check was flagged and needs a human review before we can schedule an inspection. I've created ticket TCK-48213 — a specialist will reach out within 24 hours.
My insurance document keeps getting rejected, why?
It looks like the uploaded copy was rejected for being blurry. Please re-upload a clear photo showing your name and policy dates clearly.
What's the minimum vehicle year I can drive?
Vehicles must be model year 2012 or newer in most cities. Some cities require 2014+ for premium tiers — check your city page in the app to confirm.
